series.curator_notes: The series is based on Astrid Lindgren's classic Swedish children's books 'Vi på Saltkråkan'. The main artist 'Ferien auf Saltkrokan' only has 2 albums - one compilation box set (excluded) and one Christmas special (included). The actual episodes are found under 'Astrid Lindgren Deutsch' which contains the numbered releases (1-2) and individual story releases (3-6). No Retro-Archiv or Junior variants exist for this series.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
